v2.0.0-beta

<div class="text-xl font-light leading-tight tracking-tight text-gray-600">Fish Audio S2 Beta</div>
<div class="text-xl font-light text-gray-500">on <a href="https://github.com/fishaudio/fish-speech" target="_blank" rel="noopener nofollow" class="font-light text-gray-500 hover:text-gray-600 hover:no-underline">GitHub</a></div>
</h1>
<div class="flex flex-col">
<div class="flex justify-end items-center mb-8 border-b">
<div class="flex flex-wrap items-center justify-end mb-2">
<div class="text-sm text-gray-500"><span class="mr-2 italic">pre-release</span>2 months ago</div>
</div>

<article class="flex flex-col pb-10 prose break-words max-w-none"><h1>Fish Audio S2 — Pre-Release</h1>
<blockquote>
<p>Best text-to-speech system among both open source and closed source.
</p></blockquote>
<p>Trained on <strong>10M+ hours</strong> of audio across <strong>~50 languages</strong>, S2 combines a <strong>Dual-AR architecture</strong> (Qwen3 backbone) with <strong>GRPO reinforcement learning alignment</strong> to produce natural, emotionally rich speech with fine-grained inline control.
</p><p><a href="https://github.com/fishaudio/fish-speech/blob/main/FishAudioS2TecReport.pdf" rel="nofollow noreferrer noopener" target="_blank">Technical Report</a> · <a href="https://fish.audio/blog/fish-audio-open-sources-s2/" rel="nofollow noreferrer noopener" target="_blank">Blog</a> · <a href="https://huggingface.co/fishaudio/s2-pro" rel="nofollow noreferrer noopener" target="_blank">Model</a> · <a href="https://fish.audio/" rel="nofollow noreferrer noopener" target="_blank">Playground</a>
</p><h2>Model</h2>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>Variant
</th><th>Params
</th><th>Codec
</th><th>Output
</th></tr></thead><tbody>
<tr>
<td>S2-Pro
</td><td>4B (slow) + 400M (fast)
</td><td>ModifiedDAC, 10 codebooks, ~21 Hz
</td><td>44.1 kHz
</td></tr></tbody></table>
<h2>Highlights</h2>
<ul>
<li><strong>Dual-AR</strong>: Slow AR (4B) predicts semantic codebook along time axis; Fast AR (400M) fills 9 residual codebooks per step
</li><li><strong>Inline Control</strong>: Free-form tags like <code>[laugh]</code>, <code>[whispers]</code>, <code>[super happy]</code> at word level
</li><li><strong>RL Alignment</strong>: GRPO with unified data-reward pipeline — same model for data filtering and RL reward
</li><li><strong>SGLang Streaming</strong>: RTF 0.195, TTFA ~100ms, 3000+ tokens/s on single H200
</li><li><strong>50+ Languages</strong>, multi-speaker (<code><|speaker:i|></code>), multi-turn, rapid voice cloning (10-30s reference)
</li></ul>
<h2>What's Changed</h2>
<p><strong>Model & Inference</strong>
</p><ul>
<li>New Dual-AR architecture with Qwen3 backbone, replacing Fish-Speech v1.5
</li><li>New <code>ModifiedDAC</code> audio codec (replaces Firefly/VQ-GAN)
</li><li>Support <code>fish_qwen3_omni</code> checkpoint format (sharded safetensors) with backward compatibility
</li><li>Fixed: torch.compile bugs, GPU memory leak, audio quality issues
</li></ul>
<p><strong>Docker & Deployment</strong>
</p><ul>
<li>Docker overhaul: multi-target builds, compose support, health checks, non-root user
</li><li>SGLang server integration
</li></ul>
<p><strong>API & Server</strong>
</p><ul>
<li>Reference voice management API (CRUD), multipart upload support
</li><li>Various server bug fixes, <code>/health</code> endpoint
</li></ul>
<p><strong>Finetune</strong>
</p><ul>
<li>Full finetune pipeline for S1/S2 (datasets, training, LoRA merge)
</li></ul>
<p><strong>Docs & Infra</strong>
</p><ul>
<li>README & MkDocs rewritten for S2 across 6 languages
</li><li>License updated to Fish Audio Research License
</li><li>Removed legacy code (Firefly VQ-GAN, SenseVoice, Fish Agent, old batch files)
</li></ul></article>
